summary: Comprehensive testing of Email Verification (P0) and Login Attempt Logging (P1) features completed successfully. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend pages (VerifyEmailPage, RegisterPage, LoginPage) working correctly with proper verification flow.

minor.issue: Email service is in test mode - only sends to verified owner emails (expected behavior as noted)

passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/auth/register - Creates user with email_verified=false and verification_token
✅ GET /api/auth/verify-email/{token} - Invalid token returns 400 with proper error
✅ GET /api/auth/verify-email/{token} - Empty token returns 404
✅ POST /api/auth/resend-verification - Valid email returns success
✅ POST /api/auth/resend-verification - Non-existent email handled securely (no enumeration)
✅ POST /api/auth/resend-verification - Invalid email format returns 422
✅ Login blocked for unverified users with 403 status
✅ Failed login attempts are logged
✅ Successful login attempts are logged
✅ GET /api/admin/login-attempts - Returns logs with stats
✅ Login attempts filter by success_only working
✅ Login attempts filter by email working
✅ Unauthorized access to login attempts blocked
✅ Admin login successful (admins bypass email verification)
✅ End-to-end verification flow working
✅ Frontend VerifyEmailPage loads correctly at /verify-email
✅ VerifyEmailPage shows error state with resend option for invalid tokens
✅ RegisterPage shows verification pending message after registration
✅ LoginPage shows verification warning for unverified users
✅ LoginPage shows 'Resend verification email' link in warning
seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing (ui_test_*, e2e_test_*, test_unverified_* prefixed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email verification and login attempt logging features fully implemented and tested. New MongoDB collection 'login_attempts' stores all login attempts with fields: id, email, user_id, success, failure_reason, ip_address, user_agent, timestamp. User fields for verification: email_verified (bool), verification_token (string), verification_token_expires (string). Resend email service in test mode - only verified owner emails can receive.
